steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT ACCOUNT_NUMBER, ACCOUNT_NAME, SUM(ACCOUNT_VALUE) AS VALUE
FROM DFP_ITR_CVM
WHERE CNPJ='04.423.567/0001-21' AND ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE='2024-12-31'
GROUP BY ACCOUNT_NUMBER, ACCOUNT_NAME
ORDER BY ACCOUNT_NUMBER;"} }
steps.name: cvm_base_query_tool

steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT CNPJ, REPORT_DATE, COMPANY_NAME, ORDINARY_SHARES_ISSUED, ORDINARY_SHARES_TREASURY, PREFERRED_SHARES_ISSUED, PREFERRED_SHARES_TREASURY, TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED, TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY\nFROM CVM_SHARE_COMPOSITION\nWHERE CNPJ='04.423.567/0001-21' AND REPORT_DATE='2024-12-31';"}}
steps.name: cvm_composition_query_tool
